seo_title: 432 Hz, Explained Honestly: Tuning Preference or Healing Frequency? | Sound Bath Calendar
title: 432 Hz, explained honestly
meta_description: 432 Hz is an alternative tuning standard — A tuned to 432 vibrations per second instead of the usual 440. Many players love how it feels and tune to it with real care; research so far has not found effects unique to the number. What it is, and how to hold it.
